project.name: Ace Hanei
project.address: Plot No. GH-02B, Sector 12, Noida Extension, Uttar Pradesh 201318
project.description: Ace Hanei is an upcoming, ultra-luxury residential landmark in Sector 12, Noida Extension, featuring exceptionally large apartments, neoclassical architecture, and a 100% car-free ground podium layout.
project.long_description: Ace Hanei represents the pinnacle of luxury living introduced by the renowned ACE Group in Sector 12, Greater Noida West. Spread across a sprawling 6.42 acres, the project features 6 or 7 majestic high-rise towers soaring G+25 floors. Constructed using advanced Mivan/Korean aluminum shuttering technology, the development is engineered for extreme structural durability, clean alignment, and earthquake resistance. Each tower is designed with strict low-density specifications, offering only two premium corner apartments per floor, ensuring 270-degree panoramic green views, maximum daylight optimization, and seamless ventilation. Residents enjoy an elite private lifestyle with high-speed lift cores (4 lifts serving just 2 apartments per floor), private entrance vestibules, pre-fitted VRF air conditioning, modular kitchens, and polished imported Italian marble. Just minutes from major transit pathways, the project boasts an expansive 40,000 sqft central clubhouse, multi-level basement parking, and a zero-vehicle ground podium ensuring child safety and peace of mind.

builder.name: ACE Group
builder.company_overview: ACE Group is an elite, multi-award-winning real estate developer established in 2010. Headquartered in Noida, the builder has developed a formidable reputation across Delhi-NCR for top-tier residential townships and premium commercial complexes. Renowned for delivering high-end construction quality, modern architectural design, and timely hanovers, the builder has successfully delivered over 10 landmark projects covering over 15 million sqft.

unit_types.name: 3.5 BHK (Comfort Luxury)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 3 bedroom with study and dual balconies
unit_types.description: Elegant 3.5 BHK layout featuring Italian marble in living room, laminated wooden flooring in bedrooms, and wrap-around balconies offering panoramic views.
whats_included: Imported Italian marble flooring in living areas
Laminated wooden flooring in master suite
VRF air conditioning in all rooms

unit_types.name: 4.5 BHK (Elite Grand)
unit_types.subtitle: Palatial 4 BHK with servant room and private vestibule
unit_types.description: Massive 4.5 BHK layout offering a separate entrance foyer, double-height family lounge, and walk-in dresser attached to the master suite.
whats_included: Full Italian marble across all living zones
Smart lock and video home security automation
Kohler bath systems and glass partitions

unit_types.name: 4.5 BHK XL (Signature Penthouse)
unit_types.subtitle: The crown penthouse with a signature wrap balcony
unit_types.description: The ultimate residence with private lift lobby opening directly into a massive formal dining and drawing room.
whats_included: Premium imported finishes and customized modular kitchen
VRF central air conditioning with touch control pads

connectivity.name: 130-Meter Greater Noida Link Road
connectivity.notes: Direct corridor connecting Noida and Greater Noida

assumptions: All pricing is based on early-bird builder pricing as of Q3 2026.
GST is applicable at 5% for under-construction residential projects.

payment_plan.notes: Instalments are triggered based on construction milestones as sanctioned by UP RERA.

milestones.milestone: Within 45 Days of Booking / Execution of BBA
On Casting of Top Floor Slab

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Ace Hanei represents the most luxurious, low-density under-construction flagship in Noida Extension Sector 12, offering unprecedented space configurations and elite privacy.
why_buy: Elite Low-Density Planning: Features only 2 spacious corner apartments per floor, ensuring high privacy and 270-degree views.
Advanced Construction standard: Built with Korean Mivan aluminum technology, minimizing leakage risks and maximizing strength.
Excellent Commute Connectivity: Positioned on a 130m Greater Noida Link road, close to planned metro nodes and FNG.
why_avoid: Stagnant Local Retail: High-street retail in Sector 12 is still in the early stages, requiring vehicular drives for basic needs.
Long Construction Horizon: Expected handover is in late 2028, rendering high rental outgo for interim tenants.
decision_profile.best_for: Large HNI families, tech executives seeking ultimate privacy, and wealth preservation investors.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Budget buyers with constraints under Rs 3 Cr, or investors seeking quick rental yields.

buyerPersonas.headline: Zero-Compromise Living Area
reasons: Palatial 10.2 ft ceiling heights, G+25 Roman architectures, and massive wrap-around balconies.

riskRadar.description: ACE Group has never missed a delivery timeline on major NCR structures.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Capital values in Sector 12 are appreciating rapidly due to upcoming metro lines and Yotta data center nodes.
investment_insights.rental_desc: High-end corporate tenants from neighboring IT parks drive robust rental demand.
investment_insights.market_desc: High demand for larger units (3.5 and 4.5 BHK) from expanding nuclear families.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Premium positioning of ACE brand ensures seamless secondary market exits.

persona_profile.family_stage: Nuclear family with school-going kids or elderly parents
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aspirational luxury purchase driven by building prestige, premium specifications, and extreme low-density layout.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Ace Hanei represents the finest under-construction luxury skyscraper in Noida Extension. Backed by ACE Group's spotless delivery history, this is an excellent premium family asset.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Perfect for families upgrading from older, crowded apartments. The 2-unit-per-floor core design ensures zero noise and maximum ventilation.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Strong capital appreciation play. Entry price of ₹12,500/sqft will likely rise to ₹15,000+/sqft closer to 2028 hanovers.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Exceptional. Safe, car-free ground podium level, sprawling clubhouse, and quick access to top schools.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Medium-term hold. The unique space XL layouts command premium rentals from senior management.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: The gold standard of luxury in the West corridor. Features Italian marble, pre-fitted multi-split ACs, and Hafeez Contractor design cues.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Extremely low delivery risk. All finances run via a clean SBI escrow structure in complete compliance with RERA.
walk_away_conditions: Require ready-to-move-in occupation within the next 24 months.
negotiation_leverage: Limited, as ACE Group has extremely high pricing control in the pre-launch phase.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Book immediately at pre-launch stages to secure early-bird slab pricing before the Q4 price hike.
